top_signals.title: CISA to transform how it assesses cyber vulnerabilities and risks, Andersen says
top_signals.summary: A binding operational directive being released Wednesday will direct federal agencies to change the way they address vulnerabilities by elevating some while putting others to the side.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: GSR receives FINRA approval to complete broker-dealer acquisition
top_signals.summary: GSR first announced it would acquire the Portland-based, SEC-registered broker-dealer Equilibrium Capital Services in October 2025.
